title: main.py Surgery — Split 4,057-Line CLI into octane/cli/ Modules
objective: Split octane/main.py (4,057 lines, all Typer CLI) into a clean octane/cli/ package. Each logical domain gets its own module. main.py becomes a thin ~35-line assembler.

files_created.description: Shared helpers: console, _get_synapse(), _try_daemon_route(), _get_shadow_config(), _ensure_shadow_group(), _print_dag_trace(). _get_shadow_config() merges two identical helpers (_get_watch_shadow, _get_research_shadow) from main.py.
ask command with full MSR clarification hook, monitor loop, progress stages, _print_ask_footer().
chat, feedback, session commands. _print_synapse_trace() for inline /trace.
dag dry-run command. Decomposes query and renders node table with wave mapping.
files sub-app: add/list/search/stats/reindex. PgClient + FileIndexer + EmbeddingEngine.
investigate + compare + chain top-level commands. register(app) pattern.
daemon sub-app: start/stop/status/drain/watch/resume. Full Rich Live dashboard in daemon watch with SIGINT pause prompt and ring buffer log window.
register_all(app) wires all CLI modules: 7 register() calls + 9 add_typer() sub-apps.

files_modified.change: Replaced 4,057-line monolith with 35-line thin assembler. Calls register_all(app) from octane.cli. Re-exports backward-compat symbols needed by tests: _resolve_trace_id, _print_verbose_web_trace, _EVENT_COLOURS, _EVENT_ICONS, trace, _trace, ask, _ask, _PREF_CHOICES.
Updated 2 monkeypatch targets: octane.main._research_status → octane.cli.research._research_status, octane.main._research_start → octane.cli.research._research_start.

files_preserved.description: Full 4,057-line original main.py preserved as backup. Safe to delete once satisfied.

architecture.pattern: Top-level commands export register(app: typer.Typer). Sub-app groups export *_app = typer.Typer(). All wired in octane/cli/__init__.py register_all().
architecture.dedup: _get_shadow_config() merges _get_watch_shadow() and _get_research_shadow() which were identical in main.py

next_session: Session 27 — integration tests for octane health / octane ask against live Bodega, or add `octane mcp` MCP server stub.
